## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Manifold and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and progress on trusted research environment (TRE) articles.](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team expanding rapidly (70 employees by June); Jacob introduced as new Managing Director](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Focus on TRE and AI content sections; other topics (e.g., sequence/technology) deprioritized](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [First TRE article draft (\~1000 words) submitted for review; Taylor to provide feedback by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Need for more specific, nuanced content in future articles, potentially requiring specialized writers](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Growth

  - [Funding round closed, money received 1.5 weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Aiming for \~70 employees by June (from 5 new hires this week)](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Jacob introduced as first Managing Director, will support strategy and resource planning](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Feedback method (shared document with comments) deemed effective](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Deprioritizing irrelevant sections (e.g., sequence in technology)](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Focus on TRE and AI sections; other topics require more nuance and complexity](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Terra Bio platform connection explained: Manifold to eventually replace Terra](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### First TRE Article

  - [Topic: "Understanding Trust Research Environment Security of Genomic Data"](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [\~1000 word article submitted for review](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Incorporates information from TRE white paper](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Avoids mentioning Terra platform specifically](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Future Content Planning

  - [Use 5 sections from TRE white paper as basis for future articles](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Consider creating content around R\&D lifecycle and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Potential topics: disease surveillance, low-code tooling for genomic data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Need to balance surface-level explanations with specific, actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [Taylor to review and provide feedback on first article by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [GrowthX team to update TRE topic list and start on AI section article](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Ongoing refinement of topic clusters and exploration of different angles](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Taylor to review and comment on first TRE article draft by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [GrowthX team to update TRE topic list and begin work on AI section article](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Explore options for finding specialized writers with TRE/bioinformatics expertise](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Continue refining topic clusters and content strategy based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/BVM5cxDHzosvyjoim7thdFQEmta6Ceqp?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
